mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.uid AS "uid", a.uid2 AS "uid2.id", a.info AS "info", a.type AS "type", a.miao AS "miao", a.lon AS "lon", a.lat AS "lat", a.msgid AS "msgid", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
uid2.nickname AS "uid2.nickname", uid2.icon AS "uid2.icon", uid2.sex AS "uid2.sex"
LEFT JOIN t_member uid2 ON uid2.id = a.uid2
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_coll( id, uid, uid2, info, type, miao, lon, lat, msgid, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{uid}, #{uid2.id}, #{info}, #{type}, #{miao}, #{lon}, #{lat}, #{msgid}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_coll SET uid = #{uid}, uid2 = #{uid2.id}, info = #{info}, type = #{type}, miao = #{miao}, lon = #{lon}, lat = #{lat}, msgid = #{msgid}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
